settings.title: Orlando Spine Studio
settings.tagline: Advanced chiropractic and recovery care for every body in Orlando

content.headline: Advanced Spine & Recovery Care
content.subheadline: Class IV laser therapy, shockwave treatment, and expert chiropractic care — backed by 357+ five-star reviews.

items.text: 40W Class IV Laser — Most Powerful Available

content.headline: Advanced Treatment Options
content.subheadline: Technology-driven care for lasting pain relief and recovery.

services.title: Class IV Laser Therapy
services.description: 40W deep-tissue laser accelerates healing, reduces inflammation, and eliminates pain at the cellular level.

services.title: Shockwave Therapy
services.description: Acoustic wave technology breaks up scar tissue and stimulates your body's natural healing response.

services.title: Spinal Decompression
services.description: Non-surgical decompression relieves disc pressure, reducing pain from herniated and bulging discs.

services.title: Chiropractic Care
services.description: Evidence-based adjustments restore alignment, improve mobility, and support your nervous system.

services.title: Therapeutic Massage
services.description: Targeted soft tissue work complements your treatment plan for faster, more complete recovery.

services.title: Auto Injury Recovery
services.description: Comprehensive care for whiplash, back injuries, and soft tissue damage from auto accidents.

items.label: Class IV Laser
items.description: The most powerful therapeutic laser available. Most clinics use 10-15W — we use 40W for deeper penetration and faster results.

items.label: Advanced Training
items.description: Dr. Bowles combines chiropractic expertise with cutting-edge technology and sports medicine experience.

items.label: Five-Star Reviews
items.description: Our patients consistently rate us 5 stars. Real results from real people who found lasting relief.

content.name: Dr. James Bowles
content.title: Founder & Lead Chiropractor
content.bio: Dr. Bowles graduated valedictorian from chiropractic college and completed his residency at the VA hospital. He has worked with professional soccer teams, elite athletes, and patients from all walks of life. His approach combines traditional chiropractic care with the most advanced treatment technology available.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: After years of back pain, Dr. Bowles and his team gave me my life back. The laser therapy made a difference I could feel after the first session.

reviews.name: James T.
reviews.text: Best chiropractor in Orlando, hands down. The technology they use is next-level. Same-day appointment and I walked out feeling like a new person.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: I was in a car accident and didn't know where to turn. Orlando Spine Studio handled everything — from treatment to insurance paperwork. Incredible team.

content.headline: Ready to Feel Better?
content.subtext: Same-day appointments available. Most insurance accepted. No referral needed.

children.text: Ready to start feeling better? Call us at (407) 658-6500 or visit us at 11500 University Blvd, Ste #103, Orlando, FL 32817.

content.name: Dr. James Bowles
content.title: Founder & Lead Chiropractor
content.bio: Dr. Bowles graduated valedictorian from chiropractic college and completed his residency at the VA hospital. With experience treating professional athletes and veterans, he brings a unique combination of expertise and technology to every patient visit. Orlando Spine Studio was founded on the belief that everyone deserves access to advanced, evidence-based care.

data.title: Chiropractic Care
data.short_description: Evidence-based spinal adjustments to restore alignment, improve mobility, and support nervous system function.

children.text: Our chiropractic care combines traditional hands-on techniques with modern diagnostic technology for precise, effective treatment.

data.title: Class IV Laser Therapy
data.short_description: 40W deep-tissue laser accelerates healing, reduces inflammation, and provides lasting pain relief.

children.text: Our 40W Class IV laser is the most powerful therapeutic laser available — most clinics use only 10-15W. Higher power means deeper tissue penetration and faster results.

data.title: Shockwave Therapy
data.short_description: Acoustic wave technology breaks up scar tissue and stimulates natural healing.

children.text: Shockwave therapy uses focused acoustic waves to break down scar tissue, increase blood flow, and trigger your body's natural repair mechanisms.

data.title: Spinal Decompression
data.short_description: Non-surgical treatment for herniated discs, bulging discs, and chronic back pain.

children.text: Spinal decompression gently stretches the spine, creating negative pressure that allows herniated or bulging disc material to retract — relieving pressure on nerves.

data.title: Therapeutic Massage
data.short_description: Targeted soft tissue therapy that complements your treatment plan for faster recovery.

children.text: Our therapeutic massage services are designed to complement your chiropractic treatment, addressing muscle tension and soft tissue restrictions that contribute to pain.

data.title: Auto Injury Recovery
data.short_description: Comprehensive care for whiplash, back injuries, and soft tissue damage from auto accidents.

children.text: We specialize in auto injury recovery — from initial evaluation through complete rehabilitation. We handle insurance paperwork so you can focus on healing.
